examples: Balaclava is a remote district of Sevastopol.
The name “Balaclava” itself can be translated as “a sack of fish”.
Halfway to the desolate Taldyk mountain pass we saw a young boy wearing a balaclava and crouching down against the cold.
He was wearing a black balaclava, a dark blue, long-sleeved T-shirt and dark blue or black jeans.
The court heard he went into the premises wearing a balaclava, overalls and gloves and carrying a 35cm axe.
